2603.20075.title: Agentic Harness for Real-World Compilers
2603.20075.paper_summary: Compilers are critical to modern computing, yet fixing compiler bugs is difficult. While recent large language model (LLM) advancements enable automated bug repair, compiler bugs pose unique challenges due to their complexity, deep cross-domain expertise requirements, and sparse, non-descriptive bug reports, necessitating compiler-specific tools. To bridge the gap, we introduce llvm-autofix, the first agentic harness designed to assist LLM agents in understanding and fixing compiler bugs. Our focus is on LLVM, one of the most widely used compiler infrastructures. Central to llvm-autofix are agent-friendly LLVM tools, a benchmark llvm-bench of reproducible LLVM bugs, and a tailored minimal agent llvm-autofix-mini for fixing LLVM bugs. Our evaluation demonstrates a performance decline of 60% in frontier models when tackling compiler bugs compared with common software bugs. Our minimal agent llvm-autofix-mini also outperforms the state-of-the-art by approximately 22%. This emphasizes the necessity for specialized harnesses like ours to close the loop between LLMs and compiler engineering. We believe this work establishes a foundation for advancing LLM capabilities in complex systems like compilers. GitHub: https://github.com/dtcxzyw/llvm-autofix
2603.20075.paper_summary_zh: 編譯器對於現代計算至關重要，但修復編譯器錯誤卻很困難。儘管最近大型語言模型（LLM）的進展使自動化錯誤修復成為可能，但編譯器錯誤因其複雜性、深厚的跨領域專業知識需求以及稀疏且不具描述性的錯誤報告而帶來獨特挑戰，這需要編譯器特定的工具。為了彌補這一差距，我們推出了llvm-autofix，這是第一個旨在幫助LLM代理理解和修復編譯器錯誤的代理式工具。 我們的重點是LLVM，這是最廣泛使用的編譯器基礎設施之一。 llvm-autofix的核心是友好的LLVM工具、一個可重現LLVM錯誤的基準llvm-bench，以及一個專門的最小代理llvm-autofix-mini，用於修復LLVM錯誤。 我們的評估顯示，當處理編譯器錯誤時，前沿模型的性能下降了60%，相比之下，處理常見軟體錯誤的表現更佳。 我們的最小代理llvm-autofix-mini的表現也比最先進的技術高出約22%。 這強調了像我們這樣的專門工具的必要性，以縮短LLM與編譯器工程之間的距離。 我們相信這項工作為提升LLM在編譯器等複雜系統中的能力奠定了基礎。 GitHub: https://github.com/dtcxzyw/llvm-autofix
2603.20075.author: Yingwei Zheng et.al.
2603.20075.authors: Yingwei Zheng, Cong Li, Shaohua Li, Yuqun Zhang, Zhendong Su
